subcodes.first_line: O firm offshoots of the sacred Lote-Tree! Your latest letter indicated that the promised house was purchased on 22 Ramadan [9 June 1920] for twenty-six hundred tumans cash
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فروع نابته از سدره منتهی نامه اخیر شما رسید که خانه معهود را در ۲۲ ماه
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @stories; anecdotes, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat]
